contents.markdown:
# ==This is title== ## 1. Text [Latin](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Latin) refers to an ancient Italic language originating in the region of Latium in ancient Rome. ## 2. Page Objects ### 2.1 Table Here's a sample table below, designed to be simple for easy understand and quick reference.
Table 1: This is a dummy table
Name Corp Remark
Foo
Bar Microsoft Dummy
### 2.2. Figure Here is a figure with some text ![Values 500 450 400 400 350 300 300 250 200 200 100 0 Jan Feb Mar Apr May Jun Months](figures/1.1 "- Y-axis label: "Values" with numeric scale from 0 to 500 in increments of 100 - X-axis label: "Months" with categories: Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun - Bar chart with six bars: - Jan: orange bar, value 200 - Feb: green bar, value 300 - Mar: blue bar, value 400 - Apr: orange bar, value 450 - May: green bar, value 350 - Jun: blue bar, value 250") ```chart {\"type\":\"bar\",\"data\":{\"labels\":[\"Jan\",\"Feb\",\"Mar\",\"Apr\",\"May\",\"Jun\"],\"datasets\":[{\"label\":\"Values\",\"data\":[200,300,400,450,350,250],\"backgroundColor\":[\"orange\",\"green\",\"blue\",\"orange\",\"green\",\"blue\"]}]},\"options\":{\"scales\":{\"y\":{\"min\":0,\"max\":500,\"title\":{\"display\":true,\"text\":\"Values\"}},\"x\":{\"title\":{\"display\":true,\"text\":\"Months\"}}}}} ``` ## 3. Others AI Document Intelligence is an AI service that applies advanced machine learning to extract ==text, key-value pairs, tables,== and structures from documents automatically and accurately. Turn documents into usable data and shift your focus to acting on information rather than compiling it. Start with prebuilt models or create custom models tailored to your documents both on premises and in the cloud with the AI Document Intelligence ==studio== or SDK. The custom extraction capabilities in AI Document Intelligence help you overcome this challenge by training on your own data based on just five documents. Not only is the first output more reliable and tailored to your needs, but it also allows you to provide human input to create a highly accurate model customized to your forms. $$\mathrm { M S E } = \frac { 1 } { n } \sum _ { i = 1 } ^ { n } \left( y _ { i } - \widehat { y } _ { i } \right) ^ { 2 }$$ [](https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/products/ai-services/ai-document-intelligence)

Summary.valueString: The document provides an overview of Latin as an ancient Italic language, includes a simple table with sample data, presents a bar chart figure illustrating values across months with color-coded bars, and describes the AI Document Intelligence service that uses machine learning to extract structured data from documents, emphasizing its custom extraction capabilities and accuracy improvements.

paragraphs.content: Latin refers to an ancient Italic language originating in the region of Latium in ancient Rome.
Here's a sample table below, designed to be simple for easy understand and quick reference.
Table 1: This is a dummy table
Here is a figure with some text
AI Document Intelligence is an AI service that applies advanced machine learning

to extract text, key-value pairs, tables, and structures from documents automatically and accurately. Turn documents into usable data and shift your focus to acting on information rather than compiling it. Start with prebuilt models or create custom models tailored to your documents both on premises and in the cloud with the AI Document Intelligence studio or SDK.

The custom extraction capabilities in AI Document Intelligence help you overcome this challenge by training on your own data based on just five documents. Not only is the first output more reliable and tailored to your needs, but it also allows you to provide human input to create a highly accurate model customized to your forms.

caption.content: Table 1: This is a dummy table

figures.description:
- Y-axis label: "Values" with numeric scale from 0 to 500 in increments of 100
- X-axis label: "Months" with categories: Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun
- Bar chart with six bars:
  - Jan: orange bar, value 200
  - Feb: green bar, value 300
  - Mar: blue bar, value 400
  - Apr: orange bar, value 450
  - May: green bar, value 350
  - Jun: blue bar, value 250

comments.message: This is a mock document used for showing Content Understanding features.
comments.author: Sample SDK Author

comments.message: Document Intelligence Studio is an online tool to visually explore, understand, train, and integrate features into your applications. You can easily extract key data from documents or create your own custom models with a no-code approach.
comments.author: Sample SDK Author

comments.message: Document Intelligence also supports figures, so this should be added to the feature list.
comments.author: Sample SDK Author

comments.message: Yes, I agree, and figure understanding is also on the way.
comments.author: Another SDK Sample Authoer
